# Gúthwinë ◆

> [!tip] 👑 Attachment · Cost: **2** · Leadership

![[146011.png]]

*Item. Weapon.*

---

Attach to a **_Rohan_** hero. Restricted.
**Response:** After attached hero is declared as an attacker, exhaust Gúthwinë to give that hero +2 ATK  for this attack. If this attack destroys an enemy, return a **_Rohan_** ally from your discard pile to your hand.
